channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump attempts to distance US from Israeli strikes on key Iranian gasfield
item.description: Questions raised over US knowledge of Israeli plans to attack key Iranian gasfield as energy sites become targets.

item.title: Israeli air raids devastate southern Lebanon, dozens killed in two days
item.description: The UN reports over one million displaced in Lebanon as Israeli attacks escalate, with children accounting for one-third.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 20 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: The Iran war enters day 20 as Israeli and Iranian attacks hit energy infrastructure across region.

item.title: Iran executes three convicted of killing police in recent pre-war unrest
item.description: Those executed were allegedly involved in the killing of two law enforcement personnel.

item.title: Attacks on GCC show ‘IRGC don’t think, they just push a button’
item.description: Khaled Batarfi, a Saudi political analyst, says Iran’s attacks on the GCC are irrational and create anger.

item.title: Asia’s stock markets dive after attacks on energy facilities in Qatar, Iran
item.description: Stocks tumble as attacks by Israel, Iran on critical energy infrastructure exacerbate fears for global energy supplies.

item.title: Tehran rescue workers pull survivors from rubble
item.description: Video released by Iran's Red Crescent shows emergency services rescuing survivors of US-Israeli strikes on Tehran.

item.title: Could oil hit $200 a barrel? Analysts no longer think it is far-fetched
item.description: Prices are likely to rise substantially if the Strait of Hormuz remains, in effect, closed, market watchers say.

item.title: Three Palestinian women killed during Iranian missile attack in West Bank
item.description: Women killed, 13 injured when debris from a missile, or possibly a cluster bomblet, hit a beauty salon near Hebron.

item.title: ‘Does America have a plan? Israel has a plan. Does America know?’
item.description: Daniel Levy, says that the US-Israel war on Iran is reckless and harms allies for Israel's benefit.
